Name: Doc-750K
Description: Large-scale document-level multimodal dataset from Sci-Hub, Arxiv, and OpenReview with real QA pairs derived from document structure for training native document understanding models.
Question Types: Abstract writing, Paper titling, Caption writing, Experiment writing, Translation, Document QA

Name: DUDE
Description: Multi-page, multi-domain, multi-industry DocVQA benchmark with diverse question types including extractive, abstractive, list, and not-answerable questions.
Domain: Cross-domain (Medical, Legal, Technical, Financial, Government, etc.)
Modalities: Text, Layout, Tables, Lists, Figures, Charts, Maps, Handwriting
Question Types: Extractive, Abstractive, Counting, Arithmetic, Comparison, Layout-navigating, Multi-hop

Name: LongDocURL
Description: Comprehensive benchmark integrating Understanding, Reasoning, and Locating tasks with 20 sub-tasks, covering 396 documents averaging 85.6 pages from CommonCrawl.
Domain: Cross-domain (Research Reports, User Manuals, Books, Theses, Work Summaries, Presentations, Project Proposals, Meeting Minutes)

Name: M-LongDoc
Description: Benchmark for super-long multimodal document understanding with open-ended questions requiring in-depth reasoning over documents averaging 210.8 pages.
Question Types: Analytical reasoning, Technical analysis, Domain knowledge, Visual interpretation

Name: M3DocVQA
Description: First open-domain multi-modal, multi-page, multi-document VQA benchmark requiring retrieval across 3,368 PDF documents (Wikipedia) to answer questions.

Name: MM-NIAH
Description: First benchmark for systematically evaluating MLLMs on long multimodal document comprehension via needle-in-a-haystack tasks with text and image needles.
Domain: Synthetic (constructed from OBELICS interleaved image-text data)
Min/Max Pages: N/A (context length: 1K-72K tokens, up to 36 images)

Name: MMLongBench-Doc
Description: Long-context multimodal document understanding benchmark with 1,082 expert-annotated questions over 135 lengthy PDF documents across 7 document types.
Domain: Cross-domain (Research Reports, Financial Reports, Academic Papers, Brochures, Guidelines, Admin/Industry Files, Tutorials)
Question Types: Factual, Reasoning, Cross-page comprehension, Unanswerable detection

Name: MMVQA
Description: Multipage multimodal information retrieval dataset for PDF-based VQA on research journal articles, retrieving paragraphs, tables, and figures as answers.
Modalities: Text, Layout, Tables, Figures, Figure Captions, Table Captions
Question Types: Content-based (paragraph, table, figure questions across sections)

Name: MP-DocVQA
Description: Extension of SingleDocVQA to multi-page setting; questions posed over documents with 1-20 pages from the UCSF Industry Documents Library.
Modalities: Text, Layout, Tables, Forms, Figures, Handwriting

Name: SlideVQA
Description: Multi-image document VQA dataset of slide decks requiring single-hop, multi-hop, and numerical reasoning, with annotated arithmetic expressions and bounding boxes.
Modalities: Text, Layout, Tables, Figures, Charts, Images, Diagrams

Name: UDA-Benchmark
Description: Benchmark suite for RAG-based real-world document analysis with 6 sub-datasets across finance, academia, and world knowledge domains, using raw unstructured documents.

Name: DuReaderVis
Description: First Chinese open-domain DocVQA dataset with real user queries from Baidu Search and document images from web pages, featuring long answers and multi-span extraction.
Domain: Cross-domain (Open-domain web pages from Baidu Search)
Avg # Pages: N/A (web page screenshots; avg. 1968 OCR tokens per image)
Modalities: Text, Layout, Tables, Lists, Visual features (images, colors)
Answer Types: Extractive (Text, List, Table; single-span and multi-span; avg. 180.54 tokens)

Name: InstructDoc
Description: First large-scale instruction tuning dataset for VDU covering 30 datasets and 12 tasks with diverse human-written instructions in a unified format.
Domain: Cross-domain (Forms, Receipts, Business Docs, Web Pages, Slides, Science Diagrams, UI Screens, Books, etc.)
Modalities: Text, Layout, Tables, Figures, Charts, Icons, Forms, Diagrams
Question Types: KIE, Single-page QA, Discrete reasoning, Visual reasoning, Multi-hop reasoning, NLI, Captioning, Classification, Layout analysis
Answer Types: Extractive, Generative, Classification labels, Bounding boxes

Name: PDF-VQA
Description: Document VQA dataset on scientific articles examining element recognition, layout structure understanding, and full document-level understanding across three tasks.
Num Q/A: 140,610 (81K Task A + 54K Task B + 5.7K Task C)
Question Types: Counting, Existence, Structural understanding, Object recognition, Hierarchical understanding

Name: Kleister-NDA
Description: Key information extraction from long formal Non-Disclosure Agreement documents.

Name: Kleister-Charity
Description: Key information extraction from long UK charity annual financial reports with diverse layouts.

Name: HotpotQA
Description: Multi-hop QA dataset with 113K Wikipedia-based question-answer pairs with sentence-level supporting facts and diverse question types including comparison.

Name: IIRC
Description: Incomplete Information Reading Comprehension dataset requiring retrieval of additional context from linked documents.

Name: PubLayNet
Description: Largest dataset for document layout analysis; 360K pages from PubMed Central with annotations for title, text, list, figure, and table.

Name: IIT-CDIP
Description: Complex Document Information Processing test collection with 42M low-resolution document pages from Legacy Tobacco Document Library. Widely used for self-supervised pretraining.

Name: CCpdf
Description: Large-scale multilingual corpus of PDF files from Common Crawl for visually rich document pretraining; diverse multilingual and multi-domain collection.

Name: MP-DocStruct1M
Description: Multi-page Document Parsing and Lookup training set used in DocOwl2. Tasks include Multi-page Text Parsing and Multi-page Text Lookup built from PixParse IDL and PDFA-eng-wds.
Question Types: Multi-page text parsing, Multi-page text lookup

Name: MP-DocReason51K
Description: Multi-page document reasoning instruction tuning dataset used in DocOwl2 for multi-page QA with detailed explanations and evidence pages.

Name: DocDownstream-2.0
Description: Multi-page evaluation collection used in DocOwl2 covering MP-DocVQA, DUDE, and NewsVideoQA.

Name: DocGenome12K
Description: Subset of DocGenome curated as a multi-page instruction tuning dataset used in DocOwl2 and DocSLM training.

Name: SPIQA
Description: First large-scale, free-form, open-ended scientific QA dataset covering all domains of computer science; requires holistic understanding of figures, tables, and full text.

Name: MM-LongBench-Doc
Description: Alternative naming for MMLongBench-Doc (see above entry).

Name: DocBench
Description: Benchmark for LLM-based document reading systems: 229 real PDFs and 1,102 questions across 5 domains (Academia, Finance, Government, Laws, News) with 4 question categories.

Name: ViDoSeek
Description: Benchmark specifically designed for RAG performance evaluation on visually rich documents with complex reasoning; 300 slide decks across 12 domains, requires retrieval from large corpus.

Name: NewsVideoQA
Description: News video question answering dataset used for multi-page document understanding evaluation in DocOwl2/DocSLM frameworks.

Name: EviBench
Description: Evidence-aware benchmark and training dataset used for DocR1's evidence-page-guided GRPO training with 4.8K samples.

Name: MoLoRAG+
Description: Curated SFT dataset from MMLongBench and LongDocURL used to fine-tune Qwen2.5-VL-3B via LoRA for retrieval/logical relevance scoring.

Name: MHDocVQA
Description: Multi-Hop DocVQA dataset introduced for VDocRAG evaluation requiring reasoning across multiple document pages/images.

Name: MPMQA
Description: Multimodal Product Manual Question Answering; product manuals with questions requiring multimodal understanding.

Name: LongAlpaca
Description: Long-context instruction tuning dataset (LongAlpaca-12K) for extending instruction following to long contexts; used in Docopilot training.

Name: LongCite
Description: Long-context citation generation dataset; enables LLMs to generate fine-grained citations in long-context QA.

Name: LongAlign
Description: Recipe and dataset for long-context alignment of LLMs with up to 64K context length.

Name: LongReward
Description: Long-context preference dataset improving long-context LLMs using AI feedback on helpfulness, logicality, faithfulness, and completeness.

Name: MMDU
Description: Multi-turn multi-image dialog understanding benchmark with 110 high-quality dialogues, 1600+ questions, long-form answers, up to 18K text+image tokens, 20 images, 27 turns.

Name: MMDU-45k
Description: Large-scale instruction tuning dataset for multi-turn multi-image dialog with 45K conversations; avg 9 turns, avg 5K image+text tokens.

Name: LEOPARD-INSTRUCT
Description: High-quality instruction-tuning dataset (~1.2M samples) tailored to text-rich multi-image scenarios spanning multi-page documents, multi-charts/tables, and webpage trajectories.

Name: DocILE
Description: Benchmark for Key Information Localization and Extraction and Line Item Recognition; 6.7K annotated business documents, 100K synthetic, ~1M unlabeled for pretraining.
